scripts.test:int: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -w db:reset:test && dotenv -e .env -- pnpm -w db:migrate:test && pnpm --filter @apps/api test:run
scripts.db:verify: dotenv -e .env -- node -e "const {Client}=require('pg');(async()=>{const c=new Client({connectionString:process.env.TEST_DATABASE_URL});await c.connect();const r=await c.query(\"SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' ORDER BY table_name\");console.log(r.rows.map(x=>x.table_name).join('\\n'));await c.end();})();"
